# Marketing Copilot skills

This repository now includes a project skill for the marketing site.

A repository-wide context file is also available in `.github/copilot-instructions.md` for guidance that should apply across marketing tasks.

## Available skills

- `/marketing-site-patterns` — work safely in the Next.js marketing site while preserving bilingual content, theme behavior, metadata, and conversion-focused sections.

## Scope

This skill is intentionally tuned for `african-video-platform-marketing` and its current conventions:

- Next.js 16 App Router
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- bilingual landing content
- theme switching and SEO-sensitive metadata

Use it when working on the marketing repo instead of generic Next.js guidance.
